description: Phase 11 - Reliability, Backup, Recovery: Create 5 new reliability utility modules with comprehensive tests in artifacts/edms/src/lib/reliability/
steps: Create directory artifacts/edms/src/lib/reliability/ for all reliability modules

Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/reliability/healthCheckEndpoints.ts - Health check response types: ServiceStatus (healthy/degraded/unhealthy), HealthCheckResult with service name, status, latencyMs, lastChecked. Client-side polling service: HealthCheckPoller class that periodically checks service endpoints (DB, Redis, OCR, Storage). Methods: startPolling(intervalMs), stopPolling(), getStatus(serviceName), getOverallHealth(), onStatusChange(callback). Uses event emitter pattern.
Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/reliability/healthCheckEndpoints.test.ts - Test polling lifecycle, status aggregation, degraded vs unhealthy thresholds, callback notifications

Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/reliability/backupVerification.ts - Backup status tracking types: BackupType (full/incremental/differential), BackupStatus (completed/in_progress/failed/scheduled). BackupVerificationResult with checksumValid, sizeMatch, restorable, verifiedAt. BackupTracker class: recordBackup(), verifyBackup(), getLastSuccessful(), getBackupHistory(), isOverdue(maxAgeHours). Store state in localStorage.
Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/reliability/backupVerification.test.ts - Test backup recording, verification result tracking, overdue detection, history retrieval

Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/reliability/maintenanceMode.ts - Maintenance mode detection service. Checks for maintenance flag in API response headers (X-Maintenance-Mode). MaintenanceDetector class: checkMaintenanceStatus(), isInMaintenance(), getMaintenanceMessage(), getEstimatedEndTime(), onMaintenanceChange(callback). Provides a mock/simulation mode for local testing.
Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/reliability/maintenanceMode.test.ts - Test maintenance detection, callback firing, message extraction, simulation mode

Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/reliability/startupChecks.ts - Pre-flight check utility. StartupCheck interface: name, check() => Promise<CheckResult>, critical (boolean). PreflightRunner class: registerCheck(check), runAll() => PreflightReport. PreflightReport: allPassed, criticalFailures, warnings, results[]. Default checks: localStorage available, required APIs reachable (mock), minimum browser features present.
Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/reliability/startupChecks.test.ts - Test check registration, critical vs non-critical failure handling, report generation, all-pass scenario

Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/reliability/workerHeartbeat.ts - Worker liveness tracking. WorkerInfo: id, name, lastHeartbeat, status (alive/stale/dead). HeartbeatTracker class: registerWorker(id, name), recordHeartbeat(id), getWorkerStatus(id), getStaleWorkers(thresholdMs), getAllWorkers(), removeWorker(id). Configurable staleness threshold (default 30s). Store in localStorage.
Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/reliability/workerHeartbeat.test.ts - Test heartbeat recording, staleness detection with configurable threshold, worker lifecycle (register/heartbeat/stale/dead)
Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/reliability/index.ts - Barrel export for all reliability modules
acceptance_criteria: All 5 reliability modules compile without TypeScript errors
All reliability tests pass when running: cd artifacts/edms && npx vitest run src/lib/reliability/
Health check poller correctly aggregates service statuses
Backup verification tracks and validates backup state
Maintenance mode detection works with simulated headers
Startup checks correctly categorize critical vs non-critical failures
Worker heartbeat detects stale workers based on configurable threshold
